title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? NoBroker in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
